easy.title: Basic Writing Files Task
easy.problem: Implement a simple snippet demonstrating Writing Files.
easy.solution:
import json
data = {'user': 'Arjun', 'score': 95}
with open('user.json', 'w') as f:
    json.dump(data, f, indent=2)

medium.title: Applied Writing Files Challenge
medium.problem: Build a function that uses Writing Files to process input data.
medium.solution: with open('log.txt', 'a') as f: f.write('Event logged\n')
